mnemonics: HUMAN-CENTERED: Human Understanding, Morals, Accessibility, Needs-Centered, Ethics, Rights, Empathy, Design, Equity, Responsibility
keyPoints: Design AI systems with user needs and ethical considerations at the core
Ensure accessibility and inclusivity for diverse user groups
Implement transparent and explainable AI systems
Prioritize user privacy and data protection
Continuously evaluate and improve AI systems based on human feedback
commonMistakes: Focusing solely on technical performance without considering human impact
Overlooking accessibility needs of diverse user populations
Failing to provide adequate transparency about how AI systems work
Neglecting user privacy and data protection measures
Designing AI systems without sufficient human oversight and control mechanisms
